title: epipactis sancti-bruni
intro: Epipactis sancti-bruni, also known as the Saint Bruno's Helleborine, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Epipactis sancti-bruni include relieving coughs, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Epipactis sancti-bruni can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
